headline: What Datadog (DDOG)'s AI-Focused MCP Launch and Cohesity Pact Mean For Shareholders
summary: In recent days, Cohesity announced a strategic integration with Datadog’s AI-powered observability and security platform, while Datadog also made its MCP Server generally available and added Dominic Phillips to its board, alongside reporting fourth-quarter 2025 results that exceeded revenue and earnings estimates. Together, these developments highlight Datadog’s push to embed observability into AI-agent workflows and resilience tooling, while analyst earnings estimate cuts introduce a more...
